text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 You've been approved as a Moderator. We're glad to have you on the team — feel free to introduce yourself and reach out if you have any questions.
Welcome, mentor_lina! 🎉 You've been approved as a Mentor. We're thrilled to have your experience in the community — please introduce yourself and let us know how you'd like to get involved.
Welcome, guide_sam! 🎉 You've been approved as an Event Helper. We're excited to have you involved — check the events channel to get started and don't hesitate to ask if you need anything.
